creator: ale@FreeBSD.org
text:
pkg_resources.DistributionNotFound: The 'ldap3<2.6,>=2.5' distribution was not found and is required by mitmproxy

And if I manual change the dep to allow ldap3 2.6 I get:

pkg_resources.DistributionNotFound: The 'dataclasses' distribution was not found and is required by wsproto
